examples: Agave nectar comes from the same plant that tequila is made from.
[United States] Drunk driving in New Mexico: Steady on the tequila.
The Museo de Tequila y Mezcal (Museum of Tequila and Mezcal) opened in December 2010.
Though it is made from the same plant as tequila (the magical maguey), pulque is not distilled.
